name: Solve a travel word problem
description: Math word problem. A train leaves at 3pm at 60mph. Another leaves at 5pm at 80mph on parallel track. When does the second catch up?
prompt: A train leaves the station at 3pm traveling at 60 mph. A second train leaves the same station at 5pm traveling at 80 mph on a parallel track in the same direction. At what time will the second train catch up to the first? Reply with just the clock time, e.g. 'HH:MMpm'.
